ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Goodwill of San Francisco Bay's unopposed Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, this action is stayed pending the outcome of the arbitration, which is already underway. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.4.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
